description:
You are a machine-learning engineer about to launch a small data–pre-processing step.  
    The pipeline expects three environment variables to be defined and a short, one-line
    log confirming their values.

    1. Create a dotenv file located at  
       /home/user/.env.train

    2. The .env.train file must contain **exactly** these three lines, in this order and
       with no surrounding quotes or extra spaces:

       DATASET_NAME=customer_churn  
       RAW_DATA_DIR=/home/user/raw_data  
       PROCESSED_DATA_DIR=/home/user/processed_data

       (A single trailing newline after the last line is fine and will not break the
       checker.)

    3. Load the variables from .env.train into your current shell session so that programs
       you run can see them.

    4. Produce a one-line log file at  
       /home/user/data_prep/preparation.log  
       whose sole contents match **exactly** (including case, spacing, and the final
       period):

       Dataset customer_churn prepared from /home/user/raw_data to /home/user/processed_data

       The directory /home/user/data_prep/ must be created if it does not already exist.
       Do not add any additional lines before or after that sentence.

    A simple series of 3–4 shell commands is all that’s required (e.g., create the .env
    file, export or source it, make the directory, and write the log).  The automated
    tester will verify that:

    • /home/user/.env.train exists and contains the three precise KEY=VALUE pairs shown
      above, in the correct order.  
    • /home/user/data_prep/preparation.log exists and contains exactly the single line
      specified, with no extra whitespace.  
    • The DATASET_NAME, RAW_DATA_DIR, and PROCESSED_DATA_DIR variables are visible to the
      shell that wrote the log (this is implicitly checked because the correct text must
      appear in the log).

    No additional files, directories, or console output are required.
truth:
EXPECTED_DOTENV_PATH=/home/user/.env.train
    EXPECTED_DOTENV_CONTENT="DATASET_NAME=customer_churn\nRAW_DATA_DIR=/home/user/raw_data\nPROCESSED_DATA_DIR=/home/user/processed_data\n"
    EXPECTED_LOG_DIR=/home/user/data_prep
    EXPECTED_LOG_FILE=/home/user/data_prep/preparation.log
    EXPECTED_LOG_CONTENT="Dataset customer_churn prepared from /home/user/raw_data to /home/user/processed_data\n"
name: task_000000_84fd6e7f
